flags.description: All supplier quotes exceed the budget by more than 20% (cheapest quote is 44.3% over budget). The budget may be too low for this category or quantity.
2 of 3 candidate suppliers (67%) were excluded by hard compliance gates. The policy may be filtering out legitimate suppliers, or the supplier pool is not appropriate for this category.

All suppliers rank below 30% and are clustered within 0.000 rank points of each other. The request may not be fulfillable at current specifications, or there is insufficient data to differentiate suppliers.
Only 1 supplier(s) qualified after evaluation. Competitive pricing cannot be guaranteed without market alternatives.
